```{=html}
<script>
  window.MathJax = {
    tex: {
      macros: {
        mb: ["\\mathbf{#1}", 1],
        bs: ["\\boldsymbol{#1}", 1],
        cD: "\\mathcal{D}",
        cF: "\\mathcal{F}",
        E: "\\mathbb{E}",
        Var: "\\text{Var}",
        Cov: "\\text{Cov}",
        im: "\\text{im}"
      }
    }
  };
</script>
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* ===== Proofs ===== */
div.proof {
  border-left: 3px solid #b8b8b8;
  background: #f7f7f7;
  padding: 0.6em 1em;
  margin: 1.2em 0 1.8em;
  border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
}
div.proof::after {
  content: "\220E";
  display: block;
  text-align: right;
  color: #888;
}
div.proof > p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
.proof-title { font-weight: 600; }

/* ===== Examples and other theorem environments ===== */
div.theorem {
  border-left: 3px solid #2780e3;
  background: #f0f6fd;
  padding: 0.6em 1em;
  margin: 1.2em 0 1.8em;
  border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
}
div.theorem > p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

/* ===== Headings ===== */
h2 {
  border-bottom: 2px solid #e3e3e3;
  padding-bottom: 0.3em;
  margin-top: 2.2em;
}
h4 { margin-top: 1.8em; }
h6 {
  margin-top: 1.5em;
  font-size: 0.95em;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  color: #555;
}
</style>
```
